title: Fix local:: false error in randomize() with on parameterized class (#6680)

features.name: local:: reference in randomize() with on parameterized class
features.description: Code should include a local:: reference inside a randomize() with constraint block where the randomization target is a parameterized class

features.name: parameterized class with rand member
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class definition with a rand-qualified member variable

features.name: randomize() with constraint block
features.description: Code should include a randomize() call with a with constraint block containing a local:: reference
